glosses.ja: 下線を引く; 強調する

translations.en: I want to underline that quickly.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想赶紧把这个划一下线。
translations.he: אני רוצה לסמן קו מתחת לזה מהר.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn gạch chân cái này nhanh.
translations.ar: أريد أن أضع خطًا تحت هذا بسرعة.
translations.hi: मैं इसे जल्दी रेखांकित करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg vil raskt streke under dette.
translations.sv: Jag vill snabbt stryka under det här.
translations.da: Jeg vil hurtigt sætte streg under det.
translations.ja: これにすぐ下線を引きたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (1st person singular, present), expressing volition; selects bare infinitive 'unterstreichen'.
Demonstrative pronoun functioning as the direct object (accusative).
Adverb modifying the verb; manner ('briefly').
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'will'.

sentences.target: Die Schüler sollen wichtige Sätze unterstreichen.

translations.de: Die Schüler sollen wichtige Sätze unterstreichen.
translations.en: The students are supposed to underline important sentences.
translations.es: Los alumnos deben subrayar las frases importantes.
translations.fr: Les élèves doivent souligner les phrases importantes.
translations.it: Gli studenti devono sottolineare le frasi importanti.
translations.ko: 학생들은 중요한 문장에 밑줄을 그어야 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 学生们应该给重要的句子划线。
translations.yue: 學生要為重要句子劃底線。
translations.pt: Os alunos devem sublinhar as frases importantes.
translations.he: התלמידים צריכים לסמן קו מתחת למשפטים החשובים.
translations.vi: Học sinh phải gạch chân những câu quan trọng.
translations.ar: على الطلاب أن يضعوا خطًا تحت الجمل المهمة.
translations.nl: Leerlingen moeten de belangrijke zinnen onderstrepen.
translations.hu: A diákoknak alá kell húzniuk a fontos mondatokat.
translations.hi: छात्रों को महत्वपूर्ण वाक्यों को रेखांकित करना है.
translations.el: Οι μαθητές πρέπει να υπογραμμίσουν τις σημαντικές προτάσεις.
translations.nb: Elevene skal streke under de viktige setningene.
translations.sv: Eleverna ska stryka under de viktiga meningarna.
translations.ro: Elevii trebuie să sublinieze propozițiile importante.
translations.da: Eleverne skal sætte streg under de vigtige sætninger.
translations.ja: 生徒は重要な文に下線を引くことになっている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking the subject noun phrase (nominative plural).
Common noun; head of the subject (plural).
Finite modal auxiliary (3rd person plural, present), expressing obligation; selects bare infinitive 'unterstreichen'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Sätze'; plural (accusative here).
Common noun; direct object (accusative plural) of 'unterstreichen'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'sollen'.

sentences.target: Wir müssen den Punkt deutlich unterstreichen.

translations.de: Wir müssen den Punkt deutlich unterstreichen.
translations.en: We have to underline the point clearly.
translations.fr: Nous devons souligner clairement ce point.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们必须把这一点讲清楚。
translations.yue: 我哋要好清楚咁強調呢一點。
translations.ru: Нам нужно чётко подчеркнуть этот момент.
translations.pt: Precisamos deixar esse ponto bem claro.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים להדגיש את הנקודה הזו בצורה ברורה.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần nhấn mạnh điểm này cho rõ.
translations.ar: علينا أن نؤكد هذه النقطة بوضوح.
translations.nl: We moeten dit punt duidelijk benadrukken.
translations.uk: Ми повинні чітко наголосити на цьому пункті.
translations.hu: Ezt a pontot egyértelműen hangsúlyoznunk kell.
translations.hi: हमें इस बात पर साफ़ तौर पर ज़ोर देना होगा.
translations.el: Πρέπει να τονίσουμε αυτό το σημείο με σαφήνεια.
translations.nb: Vi må tydelig understreke dette poenget.
translations.id: Kita harus menegaskan poin ini dengan jelas.
translations.sv: Vi måste betona den här punkten tydligt.
translations.ro: Trebuie să subliniem clar acest punct.
translations.da: Vi skal tydeligt fremhæve dette punkt.
translations.fi: Meidän täytyy korostaa tätä kohtaa selkeästi.
translations.ja: この点をはっきり強調する必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative plural; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (1st person plural, present), expressing necessity; selects bare infinitive 'unterstreichen'.
Definite article marking the direct object (accusative singular, masculine).
Common noun; head of the object noun phrase.
Adverb modifying the verb; manner ('clearly').
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'müssen'.

translations.he: כאן מותר לך לסמן קו מתחת.
translations.vi: Ở đây bạn được phép gạch chân.
translations.hi: यहाँ तुम रेखांकित कर सकते हो.
translations.nb: Her er det lov å streke under.
translations.da: Her må du gerne sætte streg under.
translations.ja: ここでは下線を引いてもいいよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (2nd person singular, present), expressing permission; selects bare infinitive 'unterstreichen'.
Adverb of place; modifies the verb.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'darfst'.
